title: Add HTTP retry/resilience for MemorySmith API clients
description:
## Problem
No retry policy or circuit breaker on MemorySmith HTTP clients. Every transient failure (connection reset, 503, DNS glitch) causes immediate failure. In a Minecraft bot context running for hours, this is a reliability concern.

## Desired Outcome
MemorySmith HTTP clients have standard resilience handlers (retry with backoff, circuit breaker).

## Scope
- Add `Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Resilience` package reference
- Call `AddStandardResilienceHandler()` on `"memorysmith"` and `"memorysmith-world"` named HttpClient registrations in `Program.cs`
- Verify retry behavior in integration test

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Resilience` added to `WebUI.Blazor.csproj`
- [ ] `AddStandardResilienceHandler()` called on both MemorySmith HttpClient registrations
- [ ] Integration test: transient 503 → retry succeeds
- [ ] No breaking changes to `RestMemoryGateway` interface
- [ ] All existing tests pass
